items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 5-Star EDGE Abraham Sesay commits to the Irish
items.summary: We have been expecting a wave of big time commitments coming in for Notre Dame, but what a way to start things off after the first official visit weekend of June. On Tuesday, 5-Star EDGE Abraham Sesay gave his public commitment to Notre Dame and its 2027 football recruiting class. The 6’6” 235 pound defensive […]

items.title: So here’s the good news about the 2027 Notre Dame Football recruiting class
items.summary: Notre Dame is right in the middle of the busiest part of its summer recruiting calendar with visits and official visits dominating the efforts. The Irish just had a “decommitment” from linebacker Amarri Irvin, but there is plenty of reasons to be optimistic about how their 2027 football recruiting class will eventually take shape. items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: Irish LB commit Amarri Irvin flips to Virginia Tech
items.summary: In a move that surprised no one, 4-Star linebacker Amarri Irvin announced that he has flipped his commitment from Notre Dame to Penn State. Irvin had been committed to Notre Dame since November, but this spring he started to look around for one reason or another. First it was a visit to Missouri with some […]

items.title: Five Notre Dame Football Photos for a Friday: Random Cornerbacks
items.summary: Notre Dame has the best cornerback in the country this season with Leonard Moore. This Friday’s photo tribute is to the cornerback position at Notre Dame, and five former starters at the position. Have a great Friday!
